nasb.text: Saul also went to his house at Gibeah; and the valiant men whose hearts God had touched went with him.

esv.text: Saul also went to his home at Gibeah, and with him went men of valor whose hearts God had touched.

cnv.text: 掃羅也回基比亞自己的家裡去了，有一些勇士與他一起回去；他們的心都被　神感動。

ccb.text: 扫罗返回基比亚自己的家时，有一群被上帝感动的勇士跟随他。
